sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79583" key="parqeniano/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρθεν-ιανός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n79583.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">born under the sign of Virgo,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Cat.Cod.Astr.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.112</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8(4).191</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
